        if (self.age >= 18 and 
            self.gender in ['male', 'female', 'non-binary'] and 
            self.employment_status != 'unemployed' and 
            self.education_level == 'bachelor' and 
            self.marital_status in ['single', 'widowed', 'divorced'] and
